I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me analyze both fixes:

**Fix 1 (Line 73)** - `sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap`: The `<Title>` component is used as a direct child of `<EmptyState>`, but in PF v6, `EmptyState` has a `titleText` prop instead. The `Title` component should be removed and its content moved to the `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`.

**Fix 2 (Line 72)** - `sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext`: `<EmptyState>` has a new `titleText` prop that should absorb the title content that was previously passed as a `<Title>` child.

These two fixes are complementary — they both point to the same migration: move the `<Title>` content into the `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`, and add `headingLevel` to `<EmptyState>` as well.

The migration should:
1. Remove the `<Title headingLevel="h4" size="md">...</Title>` child from `<EmptyState>`
2. Add `titleText={...}` and `headingLevel="h4"` props to `<EmptyState>`
3. Remove the `Title` import (no longer used)
4. The `EmptyStateBody` import already exists, so no new imports needed
5. `EmptyStateVariant` is used, keep it

Let me apply the changes:

arguments.after:
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.xs} titleText={t('You do not have any network maps without owner references.')} headingLevel="h4">
      <EmptyStateBody>
arguments.before:
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.xs}>
      <Title headingLevel="h4" size="md">
        {t('You do not have any network maps without owner references.')}
      </Title>
      <EmptyStateBody>

content.text: Let me verify the final result:
The file looks correct. Let me verify there are no remaining references to `Title` anywhere in the file:

No remaining references to `Title`. The file is clean and correct.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 (Line 73) — `sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap`
**Applied.** Removed the `<Title headingLevel="h4" size="md">` wrapper from inside `<EmptyState>`. The title text was moved to the `titleText` prop and the `headingLevel` was moved to a prop on `<EmptyState>` (as part of Fix 2 below). The `Title` import was removed from the `@patternfly/react-core` import block since it is no longer referenced.

### Fix 2 (Line 72) — `sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext`
**Applied.** Added `titleText={t('You do not have any network maps without owner references.')}` and `headingLevel="h4"` props to the `<EmptyState>` component, absorbing the content that was previously rendered via a `<Title>` child component. The `size="md"` prop from the old `<Title>` was intentionally dropped as it is not a valid prop on `<EmptyState>` in v6 (sizing is controlled by the `variant` prop which was already set).
